taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Quality Assurance Engineer
core_skills: Python, Java, Swift, Automation Testing, Software Development Lifecycle
skill_match_scores: Python:1.0, Java:1.0, Swift:0.0, Automation Testing:0.0, Software Development Lifecycle:1.0
must_have_quals: B.S. in Computer Science or 3-5+ years of equivalent automation experience with strong proficiency in modern scripting or compiled languages such as Python, Java, or Swift, Track record of driving development and deployment of testing tools and infrastructure at scale, with knowledge of the software development lifecycle and SQA methodologies, Ability to write, maintain, and execute comprehensive automation test plans, plus familiarity with Continuous Integration tools (e.g., Jenkins) and version control systems (e.g., GitHub), Ability to analyze test failures, triage issues, and prioritize bugs based on severity of user impact, Proficiency with Apple operating systems, including iOS, macOS, tvOS, visionOS, and watchOS
preferred_quals: Experience with AI-driven testing approaches or intelligent automation, Experience with robotics-driven testing approaches, Proficiency in Xcode, XCTest, and XCUIAutomation, Skill in manual software testing, with a focus on UI and UX, Experience with data analytics, telemetry systems, and presenting technical insights to diverse audiences
core_responsibilities: Design and develop AI-driven automation frameworks that evaluate end-to-end user experiences across Apple platforms, capturing both functional correctness and experiential quality, Architect and maintain scalable test infrastructure that delivers continuous quality signals to provide real-time insights on software readiness, Partner with manual UX testers to translate their expertise into automated test scenarios, as well as define and track metrics that quantify user experience quality across key use cases, Evaluate and integrate emerging technologies—including machine learning models, computer vision, and robotics—to continuously expand automation coverage and fidelity
job_summary: Apple is where individual creativities gather together, committing to the values that lead to great work. The System-Wide Quality organization is seeking an exceptional software quality automation engineer to join the User Experience Quality team, driving the execution of automation strategies to ensure software quality at scale.
